info.name: SaasProject API
info.description:
REST API for multi-tenant scheduling, store, WhatsApp, promotions, and generic workflows. Base URL: {{base_url}}/v1.

**Quick start:**
1. `python scripts/super_admin/seed_mock_data.py` → demo tenant (tenant_demo).
2. `python scripts/run_seed_domain.py --domain salon` → industry tenant (salon/clinic/gym/store/school/camp/car_showroom).
3. Login: `testtenant@example.com` / `123456` (demo). Industry: `admin_salon@ssbusiness.demo` / `123456` etc.
4. JWT auto-saved to `token` variable on login.
5. `python scripts/super_admin/validate_and_fix_workflows.py` → audit workflows; add `--fix` to repair legacy step codes.

**Industry tenants:** ss_business_salon, ss_business_store, ss_business_clinic, ss_business_gym, ss_business_school, ss_business_camp, ss_business_car_showroom.

**Generic Workflow Patterns** — any step combination works for any tenant:
- Full: `SHOW_PROFESSIONALS → SHOW_SERVICES → SELECT_DATE → SELECT_TIME → CONFIRM_BOOKING`
- Standard: `SHOW_SERVICES → SELECT_DATE → SELECT_TIME → CONFIRM_BOOKING`
- Express: `SHOW_SERVICES → SELECT_DATE → CONFIRM_BOOKING` (slot auto-assigned)
- Quick: `SHOW_SERVICES → CONFIRM_BOOKING` (date + slot auto-assigned)
- Price list: `SHOW_SERVICE_PRICES → END` (live prices from Services admin, read-only)
- Store browse: `BROWSE_CATALOG → CHECK_PRODUCT → END`
- Custom: any order — missing fields are auto-filled from available slots.

**Workflow admin:** `GET .../workflows/audit` validates all flows; `POST .../workflows/repair` auto-fixes legacy codes (e.g. SHOW_CATEGORIES → BROWSE_CATALOG).

**Promotion channels:** whatsapp | email | both | sms | sms+email | sms+whatsapp | all

request.description: JWT in `access_token`. Saved to collection variable `token` via Tests.
Current user (requires Bearer token)

body.raw: {"active": true}

request.description: Returns full tenant settings including `currency` (ISO 4217 code, default INR), `date_format`, `tz`, `capabilities`, etc.
`currency` is an ISO 4217 code (e.g. INR, USD, EUR, GBP, AED). Shown as symbol across dashboard, reports, orders, products, and catalog pages.
Merged defaults + tenant overrides (`templates` object).
Grouped default keys, effective text, and customization flags for admin / WhatsApp preview.
Override individual message template keys. Only keys present in body are updated (merge strategy). View available keys via GET message-templates.

body.raw:
{
  "tenant": "ss_business_newbrand",
  "display_name": "New Brand",
  "admin_email": "admin_newbrand@ssbusiness.demo",
  "admin_password": "123456",
  "tz": "Asia/Kolkata",
  "currency": "INR",
  "plan": "pro",
  "capabilities": ["appointments", "whatsapp"]
}

request.description: Super Admin only. Creates a new tenant with admin user. Set `capabilities` from available modules. The tenant slug must be unique.
Returns all supported countries with ISO2 code, name, and dial code. Used for phone number input country picker.

body.raw: {"email": "staff@demo.com", "password": "password123", "role": "staff", "tenant": "{{tenant}}", "display_name": "Staff One"}

request.description: Returns all menus for the tenant (draft and published).
Get a specific menu by menu_id. Add ?status=published or ?status=draft to filter version.

Create or update a draft menu. tree.root must reference an existing node id in tree.nodes. Options with next=workflow.* start workflows directly (e.g. workflow.demo_price_list_flow for live service prices).
Publish a draft menu to make it the active/live menu. Validates tree structure before publishing.
Delete a menu (draft only recommended — published menus should be replaced, not deleted).
Returns all action codes available for the menu builder filtered by tenant capabilities.

body.raw:
{
  "enabled": true,
  "provider": "twilio",
  "account_sid": "ACxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "auth_token": "your_auth_token",
  "from_numbers": ["whatsapp:+919000111000"],
  "webhook_secret": "dev",
  "locale_default": "en"
}

request.description: Twilio WhatsApp: `from_numbers` primary is copied to `from_number` by tenant storage.

body.raw:
{
  "enabled": true,
  "provider": "meta_cloud",
  "phone_number_id": "123456789012345",
  "access_token": "EAAxxxxxxxx",
  "from_numbers": ["+15551234567"],
  "webhook_secret": "dev",
  "locale_default": "en"
}

request.description: Meta Cloud API: `phone_number_id` + `access_token`; provider may also be `meta` in legacy configs.

body.raw:
{
  "trigger_id": "welcome_hi",
  "match": { "type": "exact", "value": "hi" },
  "action": { "kind": "static_text", "text": "Hello! Reply 1 to book, 2 to cancel." },
  "enabled": true,
  "priority": 10
}
{"enabled": false}

request.description: Simulate a customer WhatsApp message. Send 'hi' → get menu. Send '1' → start workflow. Keep sending to walk through the whole flow. Super Admin can test any tenant; Tenant Admin can only test their own (X-Tenant must match JWT).
Directly start a workflow by sending its action id (e.g. workflow.demo_booking_flow or workflow.demo_quick_booking_flow). Useful for testing specific flows without navigating the menu.
Triggers the price keyword (invoke_action show_service_prices) or use menu option 3 / workflow.demo_price_list_flow. Returns live prices from Services admin.

body.raw:
{
  "customer_name": "Test",
  "customer_phone": "+919876543210",
  "professional": "Dr. Demo One",
  "date": "{{date_str}}",
  "time": "10:00",
  "price": 600
}

request.description: Align `professional` and `date` with List professionals / slots after seeding.
Set `appointment_id` from List appointments (`id` field).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Test Pro",
  "employee_id": "POSTMAN-E001",
  "price": 100,
  "slot_interval_minutes": 30,
  "work_start": "09:00",
  "work_end": "17:00",
  "availability_criteria": "daily",
  "available_days": []
}

request.description: Requires salon.professionals.create. Unique name + employee_id per tenant. 409 if duplicate. Saves response `professional_id` to collection variable.
Set `professional_id` from List professionals, GET .../professionals/full, or Create professional (Tests). Fallback URL-encode display name e.g. Dr.%20Demo%20One if variable empty.
Paginated customer list. Add `?search=` for name/phone/email search.
Searches by name (multi-word, whitespace-tolerant), phone (E.164, national), and email.
Upload a CSV file to bulk-import customers. Required: name, phone. Optional: email, tags.
No auth. Returns `name`, `whatsapp_number`, and `currency` (ISO 4217 code, e.g. INR). Used by the public catalog page to show the correct currency symbol.
No auth. Returns active products including `image_urls` (gallery) and `description`.
No auth. Returns top-selling products by order quantity in the last N days. Used by catalog 'popular' tab.
No auth. Returns active category names for filter chips on the catalog page.
No auth. Returns currently valid offers (valid_from <= now <= valid_until) with `discount_info` (type + value) and `product_skus`. Used by the catalog page to show offer labels and discounted prices.
No auth. Creates an order from a public catalog cart. Returns `order_id`. Used by the customer-facing catalog 'Place Order' action.

body.raw:
{
  "sku": "{{sku}}",
  "name": "Facial Cream",
  "category": "Skincare",
  "price": 299,
  "mrp": 349,
  "unit": "pcs",
  "active": true,
  "description": "Deeply nourishing cream with SPF 30. Apply morning and night for best results.",
  "image_urls": [
    "/v1/media/tenant_demo/product_main.jpg",
    "/v1/media/tenant_demo/product_back.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: `image_urls` is an ordered list of image paths/URLs (gallery). `image_url` is synced to `image_urls[0]` for backward compatibility. `description` is shown in the product detail modal on the public catalog.

body.raw:
{
  "sku": "{{sku}}",
  "name": "Facial Cream Deluxe",
  "category": "Skincare",
  "price": 349,
  "active": true,
  "description": "Updated description with full ingredient list.",
  "image_urls": [
    "/v1/media/tenant_demo/product_main.jpg"
  ]
}

request.description: Returns all offers. Use `active_only=true` to get only currently valid ones.

`discount_info.type` is `percent` or `amount`. `value` is the discount magnitude. Leave `discount_info` as `{}` for label-only offers with no price reduction. Response `id` saved to `offer_id` variable via Tests.
Partial update. Send `discount_info: {}` to clear a discount while keeping the offer label.
Returns daily revenue and appointment count for the last N days. Used to render the Dashboard chart.
Returns list of available daily report dates. Use the date to download the PDF.
Returns the daily PDF report for the given date (YYYY-MM-DD). Set `date_str` variable e.g. 2026-04-07.
Returns KPI summary: today's revenue, appointments, top services.
channel=both sends via WhatsApp + Email. Response `id` saved to `promotion_id` variable.
channel=sms → sends plain text SMS to customer phone numbers. Link attachments are appended as plain URLs. Requires sms_config on the tenant.
channel=sms+whatsapp sends via both SMS and WhatsApp. channel=sms+email for SMS+Email. channel=all for all three.
channel=all sends via WhatsApp + Email + SMS simultaneously.
Sends to the configured channel. WhatsApp/email/SMS config must be set on the tenant. Returns total/sent/failed counts.
Returns per-recipient send log. `channel` field shows whatsapp / email / sms.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Ravi Kumar",
  "role": "receptionist",
  "phone": "+919876543210",
  "email": "ravi@demo.com",
  "skills": ["booking", "billing"]
}

request.description: Roles: receptionist, assistant, cashier, manager.

formdata.description: CSV with columns: name, role, phone, email, skills

request.description: Upload CSV to bulk-import staff. Download sample from admin_ui/staff_import_sample.csv in the repo.

formdata.description: CSV with columns: name, phone, email, tags

request.description: Upload CSV to bulk-import customers. Required columns: name, phone. Optional: email, tags (pipe-separated).
Upload CSV to bulk-import staff. Required columns: name, role, phone.
Upload CSV to bulk-import products. Download sample from admin_ui/products_import_sample.csv. Required: sku, name, category, price.
Unfiltered catalog of all action codes from the code registry.
Filtered by the tenant's enabled modules and capabilities.

Validate all workflows for the tenant. Returns valid flag, errors, and repair preview for legacy step codes. Same logic as `python scripts/super_admin/validate_and_fix_workflows.py --tenant {{tenant}}`.
Auto-repair legacy/invalid workflow step codes where possible (e.g. SHOW_CATEGORIES → BROWSE_CATALOG). Equivalent to validate script with --fix.
Set `workflow_id` variable to the target workflow id (e.g. demo_booking_flow, demo_price_list_flow, salon_price_list_flow).

item.name: Upsert – Full Booking (service → date → time → confirm)

body.raw:
{
  "tenant": "{{tenant}}",
  "workflow_id": "demo_booking_flow",
  "name": "Appointment Booking Flow (Full)",
  "description": "Full booking: service → date → time → confirm.",
  "active": true,
  "requires_caps": ["appointments"],
  "steps": [
    { "action_code": "SHOW_SERVICES",  "label": "Please choose a service:",        "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "SELECT_DATE",    "label": "Select your preferred date:",    "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "SELECT_TIME",    "label": "Choose an available time slot:", "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "CONFIRM_BOOKING","label": "Confirm your booking",           "input_required": false, "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "END",            "label": "✅ Appointment confirmed! We'll remind you 24 hrs before. Reply *hi* anytime.", "input_required": false, "ui_type": "list", "params": {} }
  ]
}

request.description: Full 5-step booking. Works for salon, clinic, gym. date and time both chosen by customer.

item.name: Upsert – With Professional (professional → service → date → confirm)

body.raw:
{
  "tenant": "{{tenant}}",
  "workflow_id": "demo_professional_flow",
  "name": "Book with Specific Professional",
  "description": "Choose professional first, then service and date. Time auto-assigned.",
  "active": true,
  "requires_caps": ["appointments"],
  "steps": [
    { "action_code": "SHOW_PROFESSIONALS", "label": "Choose your preferred professional:", "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "SHOW_SERVICES",      "label": "Select a service:",                 "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "SELECT_DATE",        "label": "Select your preferred date:",       "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "CONFIRM_BOOKING",    "label": "Confirm your booking",              "input_required": false, "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "END",                "label": "✅ Booked with your chosen professional! See you soon.", "input_required": false, "ui_type": "list", "params": {} }
  ]
}

request.description: 5-step flow where professional is chosen first. No SELECT_TIME step — first available slot is auto-assigned. Generic: works for salon, clinic (use LIST_DOCTORS instead of SHOW_PROFESSIONALS), gym.

body.raw:
{
  "tenant": "{{tenant}}",
  "workflow_id": "demo_express_booking_flow",
  "name": "Express Booking (Service + Date)",
  "description": "Short booking: choose service and date — time auto-assigned.",
  "active": true,
  "requires_caps": ["appointments"],
  "steps": [
    { "action_code": "SHOW_SERVICES",   "label": "Please choose a service:",     "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "SELECT_DATE",     "label": "Select your preferred date:", "input_required": true,  "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "CONFIRM_BOOKING", "label": "Confirm your booking",        "input_required": false, "ui_type": "list", "params": {} },
    { "action_code": "END",             "label": "✅ Booked! We'll assign your slot and send a reminder. Reply *hi* for main menu.", "input_required": false, "ui_type": "list", "params": {} }
  ]
}

request.description: 3-step express booking. No SELECT_TIME — first available slot auto-assigned. Works for camp, school, any tenant where time is flexible.

item.name: Upsert – Quick Booking (service → confirm, auto date+slot)

request.description: Minimal 2-step booking. Customer picks service only — professional, date, and time are all auto-assigned to the next available slot. Great for walk-in bookings.
2-step browse-only flow. Prices pulled from Services admin (active services). Works for salon and clinic tenants. Menu: next=workflow.demo_price_list_flow or trigger keyword 'price'.
Store catalog browse flow. Uses BROWSE_CATALOG + CHECK_PRODUCT (replaces legacy SHOW_CATEGORIES / SHOW_PRODUCTS placeholders).
Order lookup / support flow for store tenants.
2-step free text collection. AI_FREE_TEXT captures any message; optional AI intent classification is applied if enabled. Works for any tenant.
Permanently deletes the workflow. Set `workflow_id` variable first.
